name: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc.
description: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. is a world-leading industrial gases company that has been in operation for over 80 years. The company provides essential industrial gases, related equipment, and applications expertise to customers in dozens of industries, including refining, chemical, metals, electronics, manufacturing, and food and beverage. Air Products is also the world's leading supplier of liquefied natural gas process technology and equipment, and is a global leader in the supply of helium and hydrogen, developing and executing some of the world's largest clean hydrogen projects.
